name: agent-flow conformance vectors
note: public inputs -> expected recompute. 'conformant' = an impl reproduces every expected. The on-chain 8274 verify is a contract call, not a pure recompute, so it is checked separately (not a vector). Layer-3 bond-standing is a pure recompute over public survival(bondId) state, so it IS a vector; the live cast-call form is recompute-step scope/bond-standing.

vectors.desc: keccak256(utf8(label)) — a name->handle binding (e.g. a CAIP agentRef as a preimage leg). NOT the ERC-8004 agentId (registry id) and NOT an ENS namehash.
raw_input_hash = keccak256(raw_user_input)
sanitization_pipeline_hash = keccak256(utf8(cid) || raw_input_hash)
scopeRoot = keccak256(abi.encode(merkleRoot, count))

INITIAL-task taskHash, order+types confirmed vs filed erc-8301.md. GUARDS Fede's empty-array edge: prevReplyHashes empty → inner = keccak256(abi.encodePacked([])) = keccak256('')=0xc5d2…a470, NOT bytes32(0) — an impl that special-cases the empty array to 0x0 fails this vector.

the RECOMPUTABLE input: winRate = commit_gated_wins/(gated_wins+gated_losses) reproduces the ledger's published winRate (primary artifact). The composite reputation is an impl-defined VIEW, deliberately not a conformance value.
standing = (not slashed) and (not challenged) — recomputed from public bond state, not asserted
a slashed/challenged bond is NOT standing — its completeness claim was falsified
resolutionRoot = keccak256(abi.encode(leaves)); leaf = keccak256(abi.encode(bytes32 sourceId, uint8 option)); votes sorted by sourceId asc
same sourceIds, different values -> different root (so adversarial-a values can't reproduce the committed root)
single-source resolution
separated = w(a)!=w(b), b=a++[X]; 3-3-1 base + X(WIN) → 4-3-1 sole 50% flips → MATERIAL
3-3-1 base + X(LOSS) → 3-3-2 WIN/DRAW tie persists → NO_QUORUM → immaterial
6-1 WIN base + X(WIN) → 7-1 still WIN → not separated (robust majority, immaterial)

vectors.spec: ERC-8312 — bounded agent actions (cap invariant + Security clause: confirm/cancel bind to reserver)
vectors.desc: reserved+confirmed ≤ cap holds. Real captured state from Atlas-Protocol-AI/zero-human-loop @ 5530a9c, StatefulBound 0x3f79…faac, mandateId 0x9e3e…05bbe on Base Sepolia (storage-proven vs stateRoot).

vectors.spec: ERC-8312 — bounded agent actions (cap invariant, struct/turnover-cursor layout)
vectors.desc: Second independent implementation of the same invariant: orbmis/headroom CURSOR_HEADROOM (cumulativeTurnover ≤ maxCumulativeTurnover), distinct from StatefulBound's reserved+confirmed aggregate. Real captured state from EnvelopeRegistry 0x091f665B…07d1, envelope 0x48e972a2…bcb041 on Base Sepolia (84532), storage-proven vs stateRoot @ block 43697520 (0xbb4fbc63…) — cursorValues @ mapping-slot 2, agg=cumulativeTurnover(+2), cap=maxCumulativeTurnover(+1): recompute-step form `struct:2:2:1`.
synthetic over-cap control: aggregate exceeds the cap → the audit must reject (the cursor's enforce path makes this unreachable on-chain; the vector pins the verdict side).
namehash('eth') — the TLD node ENS resolves
namehash('agent.eth') — DISTINCT from keccak256(utf8('agent.eth'))=0x3ad7…; the ENS-identity fork Fede flagged on 8004/agent-id
namehash('vitalik.eth') — second 2-label vector
agentId = bytes32(uint256(registryId)); Wizgob = ERC-8004 registry id 860, left-padded
agentId = bytes32(uint256(registryId)); our dinamic.eth registry id 54848

vectors.spec: ERC-8275 §Composition-with-8294 seam 4 (envelope alignment); schemas pinned from ERC-8294 #1808 + ERC-8299/WYRIWE #1810
vectors.desc: One EIP-712 verifier recovers the signer for BOTH an ERC-8294 Attestation and a WYRIWE WyriweAttestation, rejects either when a committed field is tampered, and reconciles the shared agentId (8294 uint256 860 == WYRIWE bytes32(uint256(860))=0x..035c, the ERC-8299 rule). Signer = anvil key #1 (throwaway). Recompute via recompute-step seam4/envelope-align (node + ethers).

vectors.spec: ReceiptOS Step-5 capsule carrying the WYRIWE input_commitment slice; genesis encoding pinned. Three-case test vector authored by @pipavlo82, independently reproduced byte-identical (linked decision_sha256 rebuilt from the described body, not just the chaining arithmetic).
vectors.desc: input_commitment slice recomputes under wyriwe/raw + wyriwe/pipeline; capsule recomputes under receiptos/receipt-hash. Genesis: prev=null → prev_hex='' (empty), '|' delimiter retained. Linked: 2nd capsule (action.kind='nft_suggest_followup', decision.reason='input recomputes; policy clean; chained') chains onto genesis. Chain-tamper: flipping a prev_hex nibble MUST move the receipt.
